message.content:
Research the BUSINESS MODEL and FINANCIALS of Vinyas Innovative Technologies Ltd, an Indian Electronics Manufacturing Services (EMS) company in Mysore. First verify its NSE ticker (claimed: VINNY) and ISIN (claimed: INE0DK801011).

Use WebSearch then WebFetch on authoritative sources (screener.in, vinyasit.com, moneycontrol, annual reports, BSE/NSE).

Gather:
1. What the company does: business model, EMS service offerings (PCB assembly/SMT, box build, cable harnessing, design, testing).
2. End-markets served (defense, aerospace, medical, industrial, automotive, telecom) and rough revenue mix by segment.
3. Recent financials: revenue, profit, market cap (most recent year available).

You have WebSearch and WebFetch tools. Run several searches and fetch the most authoritative pages. 

Return a concise markdown bullet list of findings. After EACH fact put the exact source URL in parentheses. Distinguish confirmed facts from estimates. Flag anything unverified. Do NOT write files — return findings as your text output.

attachment.content:
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled cloud agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring cloud agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

Based on the search results, here's comprehensive information about Vinyas Innovative Technologies:

## Company Overview
Vinyas Innovative Technologies Limited is a prominent Indian Electronic Manufacturing Services (EMS) provider that specializes in design, engineering, and PCB assembly for global OEMs in the aerospace, defense, automotive, and medical sectors. Headquartered in Mysore, India, the company has established itself as a premier Electronic Manufacturing Services (EMS) and Original Design Manufacturing (ODM) partner for global and domestic markets.

## Business Model
The company's integrated EMS practices provide a comprehensive suite of services including design, prototyping, new product introduction, PCB assembly, advanced testing, product integration, wiring harness, supply chain management, and after-market support. Vinyas specializes in high-mix, low-to-medium volume production, focusing on complex PCB assemblies and box-builds for Defense, Aerospace, and Medical Imaging sectors, providing higher barriers to entry and more stable margins.

## Financial Performance
In FY2025, the company reported strong growth, with annual revenue rising 24.74% to ₹400.15 crore and net profit increasing 26.56% to ₹19.42 crore.

## Defense & Aerospace Credentials
Vinyas holds certifications such as AS9100D for Aerospace, positioning it as a preferred partner for global OEMs looking to diversify their supply chains. Vinyas has been partnering with world's best OEMs of aerospace & defence industry for over two decades.

## Global Expansion
Vinyas has incorporated a wholly owned subsidiary, Vinyas Innovative Technologies Inc., in the United States of America to expand its international presence and strengthen relationships with global customers.

input.prompt: Extract: NSE ticker symbol, BSE code, ISIN number, market cap, latest annual revenue and net profit (FY2024 and FY2025), what the company does (business description), and any end-market/segment revenue mix.

Extract the company's EMS service offerings (PCB assembly/SMT, box build, cable/wire harnessing, design, testing, etc.) and the end-markets/industries they serve (defense, aerospace, medical, industrial, automotive, telecom).

content.content:
# Vinyas Innovative Technologies Ltd - Key Information

**Ticker & Codes:**
- NSE ticker: VINYAS (SME listing)
- BSE code: Not provided in document
- ISIN: Not provided in document

**Market Cap & Financials:**
- Current market cap: ₹1,768 Cr
- FY2025 revenue: ₹397 Cr | Net profit: ₹19 Cr
- FY2026 revenue: ₹514 Cr | Net profit: ₹31 Cr

**Business Description:**
The company provides "design, engineering, and electronics manufacturing services" with core expertise in printed circuit boards and end-to-end EMS solutions including design optimization, supply chain management, PCB assembly, testing, and box build solutions for OEMs and ODMs.

**Segment/End-Market Mix:**
No specific revenue breakdown by segment or end-market is disclosed in the provided document.

# Vinyas Innovative Technologies: EMS Offerings & Markets

## EMS Service Offerings

Vinyas provides integrated electronics manufacturing services spanning the complete product lifecycle:

- **PCB Assembly & SMT**: Surface mount technology and through-hole assembly following IPC standards
- **Design & Engineering**: Concept development through detailed design
- **Prototype & NPI**: New product introduction and prototype development
- **Production Services**: Pilot and mass production capabilities
- **Box Build & Integration**: Product integration and system assembly
- **Cable & Wire Harnessing**: Harness assembly per "IPC-WHMA-A-620A (Class 1, 2 & 3)" standards
- **Testing & Inspection**: Advanced test solutions and quality acceptance
- **Aftermarket Support**: "Warranty, product information management, logistics, repair and rework services"

## End-Markets Served

Vinyas serves six primary industries:

1. **Aerospace & Defence**: Navigation and communication systems, surveillance equipment
2. **Medical**: Patient monitoring, surgical devices, ventilators, dialysis machines, diagnostic equipment
3. **Automotive**: Instrument clusters, sensor modules, lighting and climate control systems
4. **Industrial**: Power management, automation controllers, monitoring systems
5. **Telecommunication**: Infrastructure systems, routers, network security equipment
6. **Consumer**: Smart home devices, fitness products, water purification systems

The company emphasizes "flexible, Low/Medium/High Mix and Volume, High Complexity, Build-to-Specification solutions" for global customers.

## Company Overview

Vinyas Innovative Technologies Limited offers Electronic Manufacturing Services (EMS), providing design, engineering, and manufacturing solutions for defense, aerospace, and medical sectors. The company is ISO 9001:2015, AS 9100-D and ISO 13485:2016 certified and involved in designing, engineering, and electronics manufacturing services (EMS) for original equipment manufacturers and original design manufacturers (ODMs) in electronics industry.

## Key Business Details

The company provides end-to-end solutions including design for manufacturability, supply chain management, PCB assembly and advanced test solutions, product integration, Testing and Box Build Assemblies, and after-market support to OEMs and ODMs.

The company was incorporated on April 27, 2001 as a Private Limited Company and was converted into a Public Limited Company with the name changed to Vinyas Innovative Technologies Limited on June 14, 2023.

## Recent Stock Performance

As of June 15, 2026, Vinyas Innovative Technologies share price is ₹1,462.5. The company has a market capitalisation of ₹1,393 Cr as on May 27, 2026.

The company appears to be a well-established electronics manufacturing services provider with significant operations in India, particularly serving defense, aerospace, and medical industries.

content.content:
# Vinyas Innovative Technologies Ltd - FY2026 Financial Results

## Key Financial Metrics

**Revenue:** INR 518 crores for the full year ended March 31, 2026

**Net Profit:** INR 30.87 crores (Profit After Tax)

**EBITDA:** INR 64.77 crores with a margin of 12.5%

**H2 Revenue:** Approximately INR 302 crores

## Growth Indicators

- **Order Inflows:** INR 960 crores during FY26
- **Order Book:** INR 1,309 crores as of March 31, 2026
- **Expected FY27 Order Growth:** 25% to 30% increase anticipated compared to FY26

## Segment/End-Market Mix

The company's order book composition shows heavy concentration in defense applications. According to management, "the defense sector contributes about 85% to 90% of the order book." Other segments operate on rolling forecasts, with long-term orders primarily driven by defense and aerospace requirements.

**Export Contribution:** Approximately 50% of revenue comes from exports, primarily from European and US markets, with a stated expectation to maintain this 50-50 domestic-to-export split going forward.

I have sufficient information. The ISIN could not be confirmed against an authoritative listing source (no page surfaced it), so I'll flag it as unverified. Here are my findings.

# Vinyas Innovative Technologies Ltd — Research Findings

## Ticker & ISIN Verification
- **NSE ticker is VINYAS, NOT "VINNY" as claimed.** Multiple authoritative sources (NSE, screener.in, Groww, Trendlyne, TradingView) all use the symbol **VINYAS**. The claimed "VINNY" is incorrect. (https://www.screener.in/company/VINYAS/ ; https://www.nseindia.com/get-quotes/equity?symbol=VINYAS)
  - Note: Some Investing.com/CNBC feeds display vendor symbols like "VINV" / "VINYAS-IN", but the actual NSE trading symbol is **VINYAS**. (https://www.investing.com/equities/vinyas-innovative-tech)
- **Listing venue:** This is an **NSE SME (NSE Emerge)** listing, not the main board. (https://www.screener.in/company/VINYAS/)
- **BSE code:** 88617 per Indmoney. (https://www.indmoney.com/stocks/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd-share-price)
- **ISIN INE0DK801011: UNVERIFIED.** None of the authoritative pages I could fetch (screener, Groww, Trendlyne, NSE, Indmoney) surfaced the ISIN text, so I could neither confirm nor refute the claimed value. Treat as unverified — should be checked directly on the NSE/BSE security master or a depository (NSDL/CDSL) lookup. (Searched: https://www.nseindia.com/get-quotes/equity?symbol=VINYAS)

## What the Company Does (Business Model) — Confirmed
- Indian **Electronics Manufacturing Services (EMS) + ODM** provider headquartered in **Mysore**, incorporated 27 April 2001; converted to a public limited company on 14 June 2023. (https://www.vinyasit.com/ ; search via https://www.screener.in/company/VINYAS/)
- Strategy: **high-mix, low-to-medium volume, high-complexity, build-to-specification** production — focused on complex PCB assemblies and box-builds, which gives higher entry barriers and more stable margins. (https://www.vinyasit.com/ ; https://www.indiamanufacturingreview.com/manufacturing/news/vinyas-innovative-technologies-manufacturing-highquality-electronics-for-strategic-sectors-nwid-9139.html)
- Positioned as a preferred **IOP (Indian Offset Partner)** for foreign defence OEMs. (https://www.vinyasit.com/aerospace-defence/)
- Certifications: **ISO 9001:2015, AS9100D (aerospace), ISO 13485:2016 (medical).** (search via https://groww.in/stocks/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd)
- Incorporated a wholly owned US subsidiary, **Vinyas Innovative Technologies Inc.**, to expand international reach. (https://scanx.trade/stock-market-news/companies/vinyas-innovative-technologies-incorporates-wholly-owned-us-subsidiary/41708660)

### EMS Service Offerings — Confirmed (vinyasit.com)
- **PCB Assembly & SMT** — surface-mount + through-hole, per IPC standards
- **Design & Engineering** — concept through detailed design / DFM
- **Prototype & NPI** (new product introduction)
- **Box Build & Product Integration / system assembly**
- **Cable & Wire Harnessing** — per IPC-WHMA-A-620A (Class 1, 2 & 3)
- **Testing & Inspection** — advanced test solutions
- **Aftermarket support** — warranty, repair/rework, logistics, PIM
(All: https://www.vinyasit.com/)

## End-Markets Served — Confirmed
Six primary industries: **Aerospace & Defence, Medical, Automotive, Industrial, Telecommunication, Consumer.** (https://www.vinyasit.com/)
- Aerospace & Defence: navigation/communication, surveillance
- Medical: patient monitoring, ventilators, dialysis, diagnostic/imaging
- Automotive, Industrial (automation/power mgmt), Telecom (routers/network), Consumer (smart home)

### Revenue / Order Mix by Segment — Mixed confidence
- **Defence & Aerospace dominates.** Management states the **defense sector is ~85–90% of the order book**; in **H1 FY2026, Defence & Aerospace was ~78.5% of revenue.** (https://finance.yahoo.com/markets/stocks/articles/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd-nse-010216958.html ; search via https://www.bitget.com/stock/nse-vinyas/what-is)
- **Exports ~50% of revenue**, primarily Europe and US, with a stated 50/50 domestic-export split going forward. (https://finance.yahoo.com/markets/stocks/articles/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd-nse-010216958.html)
- Note: A precise FY-end segment % split (defense vs. medical vs. others) was **not disclosed** in sources I reached — the above are management commentary / order-book figures, not an audited segment table. Flag as estimate.

## Recent Financials
**FY2026 (full year ended 31 March 2026) — most recent, from earnings call:**
- Revenue: **~₹518 crore** (one fetch showed ₹514 cr; ~₹518 cr from the FY26 earnings call). (https://finance.yahoo.com/markets/stocks/articles/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd-nse-010216958.html)
- Net profit (PAT): **₹30.87 crore** (up ~59% YoY). (https://scanx.trade/stock-market-news/companies/vinyas-innovative-technologies-reports-fy26-net-profit-of-3-086-83-lakh/41584718 ; https://finance.yahoo.com/markets/stocks/articles/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd-nse-010216958.html)
- EBITDA: **₹64.77 cr (12.5% margin)**; Order inflows **₹960 cr** in FY26; Order book **₹1,309 cr** as of 31 Mar 2026; FY27 order growth guided **+25–30%**. (https://finance.yahoo.com/markets/stocks/articles/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd-nse-010216958.html)

**FY2025 (year ended 31 March 2025) — Confirmed:**
- Revenue: **₹400.15 crore** (up 24.74% from ₹320.78 cr in FY2024). (https://www.screener.in/company/VINYAS/ ; https://groww.in/stocks/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd)
- Net profit: **₹19.42 crore** (up 26.56% YoY). (https://groww.in/stocks/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd)
- FY2024 revenue baseline: **₹320.78 crore.** (search via https://www.screener.in/company/VINYAS/)

**Market cap — value varies by date (stock is volatile):**
- screener.in: **~₹1,768 cr**; Groww: **~₹1,841 cr**; an older 5paisa-cited figure: **~₹1,393 cr (as of 27 May 2026)**. Share price ~₹1,400–1,463 in mid-June 2026. Best stated as **roughly ₹1,400–1,840 crore** depending on date. (https://www.screener.in/company/VINYAS/ ; https://groww.in/stocks/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd)

## Summary of flags
- **Ticker "VINNY" is WRONG → correct symbol is VINYAS** (NSE SME/Emerge board).
- **ISIN INE0DK801011 is UNVERIFIED** — not surfaced by any authoritative source I fetched; verify via NSE/NSDL security master.
- Segment revenue percentages are management/order-book commentary, not an audited segment table — treat as estimates.
- FY2026 revenue figure shows minor variance across sources (~₹514–518 cr); FY2026 net profit ₹30.87 cr is consistent.
